message: RM path hw_startup mismatch: first op is tilize(cb_in,cb_x) but hw_startup uses (cb_x,cb_x,cb_xsq). Fix: make hw_startup conditional on IS_INPUT_RM.

DEADLOCK ROOT CAUSE: cb_xsq has 1 page but square writes Wt tiles sequentially BEFORE reduce starts reading. With Wt>1, square blocks on cb_reserve_back after 1st tile because reduce hasnt consumed anything. Fix: increase cb_xsq to Wt pages so square can complete, then reduce can consume all.
